Solo: A Star Wars Story (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $213,767,512Details
International Box Office $179,383,835
Worldwide Box Office $393,151,347
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $16,689,532
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $39,434,713
Total $56,124,245
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Through a series of daring escapades deep within a dark and dangerous criminal underworld, Han Solo meets his mighty future copilot Chewbacca and encounters the notorious gambler Lando Calrissian, in a journey that will set the course of one of the Star Wars saga’s most unlikely heroes.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$84,420,489 (39.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.53 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:54.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$330,400,000 (worldwide box office is 1.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,381 opening theaters/4,381 max. theaters, 5.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $280,643,194

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 25th, 2018 (Wide) by Walt Disney
May 25th, 2018 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: May 23rd, 2018 (Wide) (Italy)
May 23rd, 2018 (Wide) (Indonesia)
May 24th, 2018 (Wide) (China)
May 24th, 2018 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
May 25th, 2018 (Wide) (Bulgaria)
Video Release: September 14th, 2018 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of sci-fi action/violence.
(Rating bulletin 2525 (Cert #51539), 5/2/2018)
Running Time: 135 minutes
Franchise: Star Wars
Cast, crew, or production detail: Intertitle, Motion Capture Performance, Prequel, Prologue

Subgenre: Heroic Adventure
Source:Spin-Off
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action

Production/Financing Companies: Lucasfilm
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Through a series of daring escapades deep within a dark and dangerous criminal underworld, Han Solo meets his mighty future copilot Chewbacca and encounters the notorious gambler Lando Calrissian, in a journey that will set the course of one of the Star Wars saga’s most unlikely heroes.
